name: cinopsis
description: Cinopsis — browse subscribed YouTube channels, fetch transcripts, and generate Markdown summary digests. Multi-video comparison with an interactive dashboard, frame screenshots, and AI chat. Runs on Claude Code and Cowork.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API key — fallback for the in-viewer chat when the Claude CLI isn't available (e.g. on Cowork). Leave blank to use your Claude subscription via the CLI.

local_base_url.title: Local Model Base URL
local_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for local/custom chat models (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama). Optional.

local_model.title: Local Model Name
local_model.description: Model name for the local/custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. your fine-tune, gemma3, kimi-k2). Optional.
